race.description: Ladbrokes Place Extra Back Runners Up To 10th Mdn Plate
race.comment: AEROPOWER (6) finished fourth two runs back then did well last start but just found one better over 870m at Toowoomba, beaten only 1.2 lengths. Well placed and there is no reason why she cannot find winning ways. EXPRESS STAR (1) has placed four of six overall and strikes a very winnable contest here. Include in calculations. EXCESS CAPITAL (4) found the line nicely last start to get up for third over 860m at Gatton. Ready to strike now and should be winding up late again. LOQUITO (8) was prominent on straightening and stuck on well to finish second last start over 860m at Gatton, beaten a long neck. Looks well placed so expect another forward display.
